name: deadline-demon
description: Arm session deadlines and nudge AI agents to finish on time (optional hard enforcement)
author: DeadlineDemon contributors

interface.longDescription: Use deadline or deadline-hard in Codex to arm per-session deadline nudges, with optional hard enforcement after time runs out.
defaultPrompt: Use deadline 8 "finish this change" in Codex.
Use deadline-hard 10 "ship the fix" in Codex.
